title: $int
text: $int Return the integer part of X. $int ( X ) Parameters X —numeric constant, or a field (or indirect reference to a field), variable, function, or expression that evaluates to a numeric value. Return Values Calculated value. Use Allowed in all component types. Example: Using $int The following example returns the integer part of the given expression: vInt = $int(ANUMBER / 1000) Copy If the value of ANUMBER is 3456, the value stored in $intpart$ is 3. Related Links $frac Return the fractional part of X. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
